name: scientific-research-skill
description: Project-scoped research workflow with six stages, explicit human Gates, local memory, and mechanically checked Codex Hook boundaries.

interface.longDescription: Guide research from idea refinement through literature, method design, experiments, paper production, and reviewer revision with project-local state, explicit human Gates, and layered Hook checks.
defaultPrompt: Use $research to inspect this project and identify the next evidence-backed action.
Use $research to challenge this idea and build a decisive research plan.
Use $research to map these reviewer comments to evidence, edits, and replies.
